description: Legal document. Abū al-Bahā' al-Kohen Ibn al-Naḥḥāl (“the beekeeper”) undertakes to pay back his nephew Moshe ha-Kohen 66(9)0 silver dirhams, 200 dinars, and 100 irdabb of fresh wheat in the course of five years. Many details preserved (though head and left side are missing). Dated: Sivan 1525 Seleucid, which is 1214 CE. (Information from Goitein’s index card.) See T-S 16.89 (PGPID 7389).
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-13. מוחזק בבודליאן אוקספורד.
